# ra-resources
Links to resources for social science research assistants to help with coding, causal inference, survey design, policy references, etc.

**Links to coding resources**

<A HREF="https://uchicago-capp-camp-2023.github.io/lab-web/" ADD_DATE="1723220686" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">UChicago CAPP Camp: Guides to Linux, Git, and Python</A>

<A HREF="https://github.com/edrubin/EC607S21" ADD_DATE="1723238811" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Ed Rubin's Causal-inference oriented doctoral econometrics course at University of Oregon</A>

<A HREF="https://www.stata.com/links/resources-for-learning-stata/" ADD_DATE="1723653418" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Resources for learning Stata</A>

<A HREF="https://www.reddit.com/r/stata/comments/oitmt3/need_to_learn_stata_in_6_weeks/?rdt=39610" ADD_DATE="1723653427" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Need to Learn Stata in 6 weeks. : r/stata</A>

<A HREF="https://sscc.wisc.edu/sscc/pubs/intro_stata/intro_stata1.htm" ADD_DATE="1723653429" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Introduction to Stata: Using Stata</A>

<A HREF="https://wlm.userweb.mwn.de/Stata/" ADD_DATE="1723653533" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Stata Guide: About</A>
<A HREF="https://web.stanford.edu/~gentzkow/research/CodeAndData.pdf" ADD_DATE="1723229809" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Gentzkow and Shapiro's Code and Data for the Social Sciences: A Practitioner's Guide</A>

<A HREF="https://sscc.wisc.edu/sscc/pubs/stata_tables/collections.html" ADD_DATE="1724702253" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Tables in Stata - 2  Collections</A>

<A HREF="https://repec.sowi.unibe.ch/stata/estout/index.html" ADD_DATE="1730919126">estout - Making regression tables in Stata</A>

<A HREF="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rstudio/cheatsheets/master/stata2r.pdf" ADD_DATE="1739205016">(DOWNLOADS UPON CLICK) Stata to R Cheat Sheet</A>

<A HREF="https://www.w3schools.com/r/" ADD_DATE="1733184083" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">R Tutorial</A>

<A HREF="https://rstudio-education.github.io/hopr/dataio.html" ADD_DATE="1742405211">D Loading and Saving Data in R | Hands-On Programming with R</A>

<A HREF="https://www.usu.edu/math/amlc/files/r-studio-reference-sheets-compilation.pdf" ADD_DATE="1725377808" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">r-cheat-sheet.key</A>

<A HREF="https://github.com/Center-for-Education-Data-and-Research/scraping_tutorial" ADD_DATE="1731434527" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Center-for-Education-Data-and-Research/scraping_tutorial: Scraping tutorial for CEDR and CALDER</A>

<A HREF="https://www.povertyactionlab.org/resource/power-calculations?lang=fr?lang=en" ADD_DATE="1731971766" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Power calculations | The Abdul Latif Jameel Poverty Action Lab</A>

<A HREF="https://data.poverty-action.org/" ADD_DATE="1739304156">Innovations for Poverty Action Knowledge Hub: Research, data science, and MEL resources curated by IPA</A>

<A HREF="https://www.princeton.edu/~otorres/Panel101.pdf" ADD_DATE="1742846487" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Panel Data Analysis: Fixed and Random Effects Using Stata</A>

<A HREF="https://www.limesurvey.org/manual/Expression_Manager" ADD_DATE="1743526910" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Expression Manager - LimeSurvey Manual</A>

<A HREF="https://github.com/PovertyAction/IPA-Stata-Trainings" ADD_DATE="1747861786" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">PovertyAction/IPA-Stata-Trainings: Houses IPA&#39;s Stata training courses and code.</A>

<A HREF="https://stats.oarc.ucla.edu/r/" ADD_DATE="1747862149" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">UCLA Statisical Methods and Data Analytics R Resources</A>

<A HREF="https://stats.oarc.ucla.edu/stata/" ADD_DATE="1747862173" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">UCLA Statisical Methods and Data Analytics Stata Resources</A>

<A HREF="https://github.com/orgs/OpenSDP/repositories">Strategic Data Project Github with multiple repos on Stata and R</A>

<A HREF="https://poverty-action.org/publication/ipa%27s-best-practices-data-and-code-management" ADD_DATE="1747928529" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">IPA&#39;s Best Practices for Data and Code Management | IPA</A>

<A HREF="https://guttinst.github.io/" ADD_DATE="1747929058">Guttenmacher Institute Coding Style Guide</A>

<A HREF="https://www.sthda.com/english/wiki/ggplot2-point-shapes" ADD_DATE="1748980770" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Guide to ggplot2 point shapes</A>

<A HREF="https://stringr.tidyverse.org/reference/str_replace.html" ADD_DATE="1749489483" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Stringr wiki for string manipulation in R</A>

<A HREF="https://libguides.princeton.edu/dss" ADD_DATE="1749678458" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Home - Getting Started in Data Analysis: Stata, R, SPSS, Excel - Research Guides at Princeton University</A>

<A HREF="https://geocenter.github.io/StataTraining/portfolio/01_resource/" ADD_DATE="1750796218">Stata cheat sheets</A>

<A HREF="https://r4ds.hadley.nz/" ADD_DATE="1750796729" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">R for Data Science Free Ebook(2e)</A>

<A HREF="https://www.tmwr.org/" ADD_DATE="1750796799">Tidy Modeling with R</A>

<A HREF="https://assets.press.princeton.edu/chapters/s11025.pdf" ADD_DATE="1750798779">Quantitative Social Science: An Introduction - Chapter one Introduction</A>

<A HREF="https://r-spatial.org/book/" ADD_DATE="1751475880">Spatial Data Science Free Ebook</A>
<A HREF="https://bookdown.org/content/d1e53ac9-28ce-472f-bc2c-f499f18264a3/index.html#coverpage" ADD_DATE="1780693332">Best Coding Practices for R</A>

**Other resources for economics, being an RA, running RCTs, etc**
<DT><A HREF="https://opportunityinsights.org/course/" ADD_DATE="1723065009" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Big Data to Solve Economic and Social Problems | Opportunity Insights</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://www.wqu.edu/adsl-apply" ADD_DATE="1723065032" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">WQU | Apply for the Applied Data Science Lab · WQU</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://mru.org/" ADD_DATE="1723065035" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Economics Videos | Marginal Revolution University</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://ibread.org/courses/" ADD_DATE="1723653402" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Courses – BREAD</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://guides.library.harvard.edu/c.php?g=310680&p=2072552" ADD_DATE="1724264490" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Think Tank Search - Think Tank Search - Research Guides at Harvard Library</A>
            <DT><A HREF="http://runningres.com/" ADD_DATE="1729723909" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Running Randomized Evaluations: A Practical Guide</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://github.com/gentzkow/lab-manual-archive/wiki" ADD_DATE="1729723937" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">RA Wiki for Code and Data for the Social Sciences: A Practical Guide</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://raguide.github.io/appendix/learning" ADD_DATE="1729724302" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Learning more | Econ RA Guide</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://github.com/michaelstepner/healthinequality-code/blob/main/code/readme.md#contents" ADD_DATE="1729724308" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Health Inequality Project Coding Style Guide</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://dimewiki.worldbank.org/Main_Page" ADD_DATE="1729724319" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Wiki for the World Bank's Impact Evaluation Dept (DIME)</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://msair-my.sharepoint.com/:p:/g/personal/mdearmond_air_org/ERdeFBQCtMVKhFUhZYhWr9cB-6ySZaKrPeIIHCR677P7uw?email=mduque%40air.org&wdOrigin=TEAMS-MAGLEV.p2p_ns.rwc&wdExp=TEAMS-TREATMENT&wdhostclicktime=1730319582617&web=1" ADD_DATE="1730323696" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Writing for Policymakers Presentation by Michael DeArmond (need to get access from him first)</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://policycommons.net/" ADD_DATE="1730828557" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Policy Commons</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://www.extension.iastate.edu/documents/anr/likertscaleexamplesforsurveys.pdf" ADD_DATE="1730851057" ICON="data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAABAAAAAQCAYAAAAf8/9hAAAAWklEQVQ4jWNgoBAwMjAwMJxhMP4PEzBhOMuIjY9OY5iELIiuAMZHpxkYGBiYKPXCMDCABZcELKBMGM4y4pPHagBME9boQlMz8GEwDAxgYUBL47gyC678QTEAAEdXLAzr8iPBAAAAAElFTkSuQmCC">Likert scale examples for surveys</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://www.khanacademy.org/math/statistics-probability" ADD_DATE="1731969337" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Statistics and Probability | Khan Academy</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://lrl.texas.gov/geninfo/publicpolicy.cfm" ADD_DATE="1734546349" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Legislative Reference Library | General Information | Public policy resources</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://docs.iza.org/dp16276.pdf" ADD_DATE="1734650356">Writing Tips for Crafting Effective Economics Research Papers – 2023-2024 Edition</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://policyviz.com/resources/policyviz-data-visualization-catalog/" ADD_DATE="1747842801" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">PolicyViz Data Visualization Catalog - PolicyViz</A>

**News sites that report on education research**
   <DT><A HREF="https://www.edweek.org/" ADD_DATE="1723064994" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">Education Week - K-12 education news and information</A>
            <DT><A HREF="https://www.chronicle.com/" ADD_DATE="1723064989" ICON="data:image/png;base64,">The Chronicle of Higher Education | Higher Ed News, Opinion, &amp; Advice</A>
